title: streblus indicus
intro: Streblus indicus, also known as the Black Beer Tree, is a species of fig tree native to the Indian subcontinent. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Streblus indicus include its ability to reduce fever, treat digestive issues, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
